name: sysml-v2-lsp
description: Language Server Protocol implementation for SysML v2, powered by ANTLR4

sysml.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the SysML language server.

sysml.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Maximum number of problems reported per file.

sysml.library.path.description: Path to SysML v2 standard library directory.

scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run compile && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.build:production: npm run generate && npm run compile && node esbuild.mjs --production
scripts.update-grammar: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daltskin/sysml-v2-grammar/main/grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.g4 -o grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.g4 && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daltskin/sysml-v2-grammar/main/grammar/SysMLv2Parser.g4 -o grammar/SysMLv2Parser.g4 && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daltskin/sysml-v2-grammar/main/grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.tokens -o grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.tokens && echo '✅ Grammar files updated from daltskin/sysml-v2-grammar'
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
